data.title: [ticket_edit]: declare -A requires bash 4+ -> fails on default macOS bash 3.2
data.description:
## Incident Overview
Source: code review (passed) — minor finding not addressed in this session.

## Actual Behavior
ticket_edit in ticket-lib-api.sh uses bash declare -A (associative arrays) for field parsing. macOS ships bash 3.2 which does not support declare -A. The function will fail on default macOS installations.

## Expected Behavior
ticket_edit should use python3 inline for structured field parsing (consistent with sibling functions ticket_create, ticket_comment, ticket_transition which all use python3 for structured data).

## Fix
Replace the declare -A fields pattern in ticket_edit with python3-based argument parsing, consistent with the rest of ticket-lib-api.sh.
File: plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib-api.sh
Category: design
